title: Joe Ferro
summary: The original leader of the Cleaners, who made fire the faction's method for eliminating Green Poison.

claims.text: The official faction recap identifies Joe Ferro as the original leader of the Cleaners.
Ferro adopted fire as the drastic method for eliminating Green Poison, and the Division later killed him.

paragraphs.text: Ferro establishes the Cleaners' defining belief that infection can be eradicated through fire. His death forces the faction to regroup before its return under Vivian Conley.

verification.notes: Biographical details beyond the official faction recap remain pending direct evidence.
